text.title: outcome-based-roadmaps Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for outcome-based-roadmaps as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Vanity outcomes: "increase engagement", "delight users", "improve the platform".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Unmeasurable outcomes cannot be scored, kill-signalled, or retrospected. Teams pursue them indefinitely with no feedback loop. Apply the verb+metric+delta+timeframe test: if the outcome fails it, rewrite before planning.

failure-mode.description: Outcome inflation: every quarter declares 5+ outcomes, none get the sustained focus needed.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Each additional outcome divides attention and creates coordination overhead. Solo teams with 5 outcomes effectively have 5 equal priorities—indistinguishable from no priority. Cap at 3 for solo, 5 for small teams.

failure-mode.description: Disconnect from delivery: engineering runs a feature backlog and the outcome roadmap becomes a parallel document nobody trusts or references.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The roadmap becomes decoration unless initiatives in the backlog are tagged to outcome IDs. Without traceability, sprint planning ignores the roadmap entirely.

failure-mode.description: Confusing activities (inputs) with outcomes (metric movements): "run 5 user interviews" as an outcome.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Activities are means, not ends. A team can complete all activities and move no metrics. Outcomes must describe the metric state change, not the work done to achieve it.

failure-mode.description: Outcome roadmap weak with stakeholders who pay per feature; they push back unless they also receive a feature-derivative view.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Some audiences need feature language to understand what they are getting. Maintain the outcome roadmap internally; produce a feature-derivative or theme-only view for feature-oriented stakeholders.
